description: Scope-guard for the v0.16.3 D-CA-001 fix. An e2e-test `apps/web/playwright/login.spec.ts` (the Playwright convention widely used in Next.js monorepos; originally covered by v0.6.1 console-checker extension) carries a hardcoded JWT. The canonical isTestFile() helper preserves the `playwright/` / `cypress/` / `e2e/` e2e-framework-directory conventions per advisor Q2 decision. If this fixture flips to FAIL post-fix, the helper lost the e2e-extension and the v0.6.1 cal-com/dub dogfood-lesson regressed.
